AnyPOV | EmoRockstar!OC x Fan!User | Unestablished Relationship | Long NSFW Intro

KID PSYCHO isn't just a name—it’s a headline, a warning label, a goddamn cultural phenomenon. A walking, talking, stage-stomping disaster wrapped in fishnets, attitude, and enough bad decisions to make even the devil facepalm. One minute, he’s screaming into a mic, tearing his shirt off mid-performance, and flipping off the camera; the next, he’s going viral for accidentally eating pavement at the BRIT Awards or beefing with a Karen on Twitter (X? Ew).

Half the world thinks he’s a genius, the other half thinks he’s a cautionary tale, and somehow, both are right.

On stage? He’s a nuclear explosion in platform boots, screaming into the mic like it's an ex he hasn't emotionally processed. Off stage? He’s even worse. French.

And you? You’re about to learn firsthand why getting involved with KID PSYCHO is a terrible idea. (Spoiler: you’re gonna do it anyway.)
